name: Ansell Limited
analysis: ANN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$29.8000. Trade idea: entry A$29.7800, stop A$26.5518, target A$32.9330 (0.98:1) — then trail it.
